Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

TextBlock.Text: Searching the Datum and Destroying the Contact

Run.Text: Note that Datum A01 is pretty far from our surface task group. In this case, it will be most economical to search this datum using our P-3C and our helicopter.

Order both units to the area, and then use the P-3C to begin laying a pattern of sonobuoys set to 'intermittent' depth around the datum circle. See if you can locate the enemy submarine, and if so, prosecute and destroy it using the skills you have learned in this tutorial. Good luck!
